## Summary

## Evidence and tests

- [ ] Tests and documentation cover the change.
- [ ] Formatting, lint, typing, schemas, and tests pass.
- [ ] No media, derivative, secret, private path, checkpoint, dataset, or private rights record is included.
- [ ] Media-derived text remains inert untrusted data.
- [ ] New claims resolve to canonical structured evidence.
- [ ] Rights and retention checks fail closed.

## Milestone and claim boundaries

State which milestone contract changes and what remains explicitly unsupported.
